curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The core vulnerability is in parse_jwt_token in user_credentials.py, which decoded the JWT bearer token but did not verify the issuer claim against allowed AAD tenants. Secondary locations are the info and negotiate endpoint handlers, which lacked call_if_user authorization wrappers. The patch modifies 12 files total, but many are deployment configs, docs, type models, and tests. Core vulnerability locations are the 3 API service source files listed.
